cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Machine Learning Engineer role at Apple. I saw you are looking for someone to build data curation pipelines and deep learning algorithms for video processing. My experience in building automated data systems and working with core C++ software matches this need.

I built ValoFenua, a platform that uses a daily scraper to collect over 1,300 property listings. This data feeds into an IA agent that calculates price ranges based on market trends. I also built a personal job search pipeline using n8n and AI agents to process large amounts of web data autonomously. These projects taught me how to handle the full cycle from raw data collection to model output.

At my current role with EXAIL Robotics, I develop features in C++ and JavaScript. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take nearly 2 days to complete. I reduced that to 2 hours, which is an 85% improvement. I made the system simple enough for any team member to use without technical help.

I am currently finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I would love to talk about how my experience with automated pipelines can support the video processing team in Singapore.

Aodren Gloux

stack: IoT, sensors, Python, AWS, Azure, GCP, MQTT, CoAP, Data Analysis
experience_requise: Associate level (experience as R&D engineer requested)
points_positifs: Focus on IoT and automation matches perfectly with the candidate's core profile.
Specifically looks for Python and sensor data experience, which aligns with the Eye-tracking and ValoFenua projects.
Valued background in hardware integration and data processing.
points_negatifs: Mentions 'Senior Research Scientist' in the body but 'Associate' in the metadata, creating a slight ambiguity on level.
Prefers PhD, though Master's is the minimum requirement (Aodren is currently in M.S.).
commentaire: Une excellente opportunité chez Bosch pour appliquer des compétences en IoT et automatisation. Le profil d'Aodren avec l'eye-tracking chez Exail et ses projets personnels d'automatisation (n8n, scraping) résonne bien avec les besoins en capture de données et analyse de capteurs.

Utilisation de Java et SQL, deux compétences maîtrisées par Aodren
points_negatifs: Marché très compétitif (plus de 200 candidats)

commentaire: Une excellente opportunité en 'Entry level' dans une entreprise solide. Le poste demande des compétences en automatisation de build et de déploiement, ce qui matche parfaitement avec l'expérience d'Aodren chez EXAIL.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Java Developer role at AvePoint. I saw you're looking for someone who can combine Java development with build and release automation, which aligns perfectly with my background in software engineering and CI/CD workflows.

I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. I also redesigned our installation process, which used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. For my personal projects, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app using a PostgreSQL database where I handle all data fetching through automated SQL scripts and scrapers.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I'm impressed by AvePoint's work in data management for global collaboration platforms and would love to contribute to your financial supervision products.

Aodren Gloux

stack: PLC, Python, Power BI, Microsoft Office
points_positifs: Poste axé sur l'automatisation dans un environnement de fabrication
Niveau Entry level accepté
La maîtrise de Python et d'autres langages de programmation est un plus
points_negatifs: Forte composante maintenance d'équipements physiques et PLC qui s'éloigne du pur Software Engineering
Besoin probable de sponsorship de visa
commentaire: Une opportunité intéressante chez un leader de l'industrie pour appliquer des compétences en automatisation et programmation (Python) à des processus industriels réels.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Automation Equipment Engineer position at Celestica. Your focus on real-time problem analysis and improving manufacturing productivity through automation aligns perfectly with my background in engineering and process optimization.

At EXAIL Robotics, I develop core features in C++ and JavaScript. I recently redesigned the installation and deployment process for our systems. It used to take about 2 days for a technician to complete. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I also have experience building data-driven tools, such as an automated real estate scraper and price estimation engine using Python and AI agents.

I am currently finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I am a fast learner and I am comfortable working with various programming languages to solve hardware and software bottlenecks. I value the win-win approach Mentioned in your job description, especially when it comes to maintaining high safety and quality standards.

I look forward to discussing how my software and automation skills can support Celestica's manufacturing lines in Singapore.

Aodren Gloux

cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the SW Engineer (SRE) position at Visa. I noticed your focus on reducing operational toil and automating repeated workflows, which is exactly where I focus my efforts as a developer. I enjoy building systems that handle complexity at scale, much like Visa's global processing network.

I currently develop features in C++ and JavaScript at EXAIL Robotics. During my time there, I redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I also built ValoFenua, a full-stack React app with a daily scraper and an AI agent that analyzes market data to provide real-time estimates.

I have a strong foundation in Java and experience with containers like Docker and Kubernetes. I also built a personal automation pipeline using n8n and AI agents to manage large-scale data tasks on a VPS. I'm comfortable pushing technical boundaries to find more efficient ways to maintain system reliability.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering in 2026. I would love to bring my focus on automation to help Visa maintain its 65k transactions per second standard.

Aodren Gloux

cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the AI Scientist role at Resaro.AI. Your focus on building frameworks to stress-test Reinforcement Learning systems aligns perfectly with my background in software automation and AI integration.

I built a professional automation pipeline using n8n and AI agents to handle complex data scraping and processing tasks. For my platform ValoFenua, I developed an AI-driven engine that analyzes over 1,300 daily property listings to generate precise market estimates. This project required building robust data flows and ensuring the reliability of automated outputs in a production environment.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days for a technician to set everything up. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That is an 85% reduction in deployment time through technical rigor and automation.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. Your mission of creating a trusted AI market is essential, and I would value the chance to help build Resaro's testing infrastructure.

Aodren Gloux
